summary:
PROPHETIC VISIONS OF CHURCH REVIVAL: Brandon recounts a profound spiritual vision concerning Living Word Church in Minnesota, led by pastors Lynne and Mac Hammond. He describes seeing younger versions of the pastors and early prayer warriors planting spiritual seeds of tears that have lain dormant in the church's foundation. Brandon explains that these seeds, planted by figures like Rachel Teafatiller and Jeannie Wilkerson, are now being watered by a heavenly flow, sprouting into a massive harvest of revival. He details a supernatural manifestation where a mist of the Holy Spirit will sweep through congregations, leaving a tangible residue of gold dust and diamond-like particles on believers' clothing. Brandon draws a parallel between a receding ocean tide and the current perceived dryness in the church, warning that this spiritual drought is merely the precursor to a massive tsunami wave of God's glory that is about to strike globally.

GLOBAL OUTPOURINGS AND HOLLYWOOD AWAKENING: Brandon shares that this incoming spiritual wave will extend far beyond Minnesota, sparking new Azusa Street-level revivals in places like Collinsville, Branson, California, Fort Worth's Eagle Mountain, and Andrew Wommack's Charis Bible College in Colorado Springs. He emphasizes that the revival will reach South America, Australia, and every corner of the earth. Brandon specifically prophesies a massive spiritual shift in Hollywood, claiming that the porn industry will dry up temporarily as major A-list celebrities convert to Christianity and host indoor revival meetings in their mansions. He also mentions filmmaker Mel Gibson, urging spiritual support for him as he produces a new fifty million dollar movie that will face severe satanic warfare but will ultimately send spiritual shockwaves through movie theaters.

FINANCIAL PROSPERITY AND MARRIAGE SANCTITY: Brandon encourages believers to anticipate supernatural financial increase despite worldly economic downturns. He advocates for tithing and trusting in divine multiplication, even expressing faith in certain cryptocurrencies as part of God's financial blessing. Transitioning to family life, Brandon strongly warns against domestic strife and explicitly condemns the concept of divorce, urging couples to prioritize peace and love. He passionately speaks out against living together outside of wedlock, open marriages, and infidelity, insisting that believers must maintain sexual purity and build their relationships on the foundation of biblical covenants rather than worldly compromise.

END TIMES PREPARATION AND SPIRITUAL DISCERNMENT: Brandon urgently warns that the return of Jesus Christ is imminent and that the spiritual door of the ark is preparing to close. He notes that while Christ will return like a thief in the night for unbelievers, spiritually awakened Christians will feel the shift in the atmosphere and recognize the signs of the times. Brandon notes that God is raising up young intercessors and children to pray fervently in these final days. He also affirms that believers will increasingly experience angelic visitations and dreams, fulfilling biblical prophecy, and will be given spiritual discernment to distinguish authentic divine encounters from false ones.
rawData: [August 26, 2025]-[The Lord showed us gold dust was going to come in church services]-[https://youtu.be/u5z9li0Tli4]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us again today. Well, I have my sweetheart with me here again, and I told her, I said, "Man, yesterday's video was powerful. If you did not watch that prayer part when the Lord showed up in our prayer time, my goodness, that was life-changing." I told Diana, I said, "I didn't want to stop praying, but I knew that it was—I could feel it lifting." And so I was like, you know, you only go as long as the Spirit of the Lord is there. You're not there to keep doing something if He's not in it. But I'm going to do everything with Him, and I'm going to pick it like a chicken bone. Every time we do those prayer sessions, Diana, the day after or until we make the next video, will go through it looking for scripture references to the things the Father was saying, because we know everything the Lord is going to tell you lines up with His Word. He doesn't ever deviate from His Word about revival or anything. It always lines up with the Bible. And if it doesn't, you really need to realize that 99.9% of the time, it's not God. If it lines up with scripture, you know it's the Father. He's speaking to you because He'll speak, and His Word stands alone. It's a pillar, but He always verifies, and the Word lines up with the prophetic. So, this is the scripture that the Lord was speaking to us about Living Word Church yesterday, and some in Collinsville and Branson. He gave us this scripture, and I'm going to have Diana read it here: Psalm 126. Go ahead and read that. "When the Lord brought back his exiles to Jerusalem, it was like a dream. We were filled with laughter and we sang for joy. And the other nations said, 'What amazing things the Lord has done for them.' Yes, the Lord has done amazing things for us. What joy! Restore our fortunes, Lord, as streams renew the desert. Those who plant in tears will harvest with shouts of joy. They weep as they go to plant their seed, but they sing as they return with the harvest." So He was quoting to us verse five. Go ahead and read verse 5. "Those who plant in tears will harvest with shouts of joy. They weep as they go to plant their seed, but they sing as they return with the harvest." He's talking about the harvest that's about to take place. Exciting. So, let's just get right into the vision, what He showed us yesterday. Like I said, I am not really familiar with Living Word, but He keeps talking about Minnesota and what's going to happen in Minnesota. And then what was awesome is—and we'll get into this—He talked about what's about to happen in California and all these other areas. I'm telling you, this vision that we had yesterday was wow. So, I encourage you to watch this whole video because it will really bless you. If you didn't watch the whole prayer video yesterday, I encourage you to go back and watch it again. Listen to the prayer part, what was coming right out of the throne room of the Father. Now, I was seeing Lynne Hammond, who is the pastor over Living Word with her husband Mac. And so, she is the prayer warrior. She's the one that prays like what I'm talking about. But I saw her as a younger woman in this vision. I saw her as a younger woman when they first started the church, and I saw her praying alone. She was praying and travailing for the lost. And as she would pray, people would be added. I saw these people that were strategically placed at Living Word for prayer. They would rise up beside her, and as she prayed, it was like a fire torch inside of her that would catch on to that other person, and then they would catch the fire and start praying. As the prayers of that church group, or whoever was praying there, each one would pray, and the fire would spread. I could see the prayer group getting bigger and bigger and bigger. But as they were praying, they were sowing seeds into the ground. I could see in that vision thick, manure-looking soil that was rich, like Miracle-Gro soil. But the seeds went—not growing, but they went dormant. They went into the ground and were being held, not for then, but they were praying for what's about to happen. Some of the time they thought, "Well, Lord," crying out and weeping, and that's the scripture He gave us. They were sowing in their tears, but they're about to reap in joy. They were sowing these tears of prayers, and they were going into the foundation of the church, and they never saw the full manifestation of all the years of prayers, from Brother Halverson to Lucy when she was here on the earth. There were so many prayers of the saints that went into the ground, and you'd see a couple sprouts of growth here and there. And there was a beginning revival that was a former—what you want to call a former rain of that church, a former glory. And the Lord said to me, I saw those seeds as they prayed in these prayer groups. I saw a heavy-set woman. I don't know who she was. I saw all these people, and they were in circles, and they just kept at it. They kept planting. They kept planting. And the Lord said, "Some plant, some water, and some bring forth the increase." Not every one of the seeds in the past from the elders, from Rachel Tateller to all these great prayer warriors—Jeannie Wilkerson, all these great prayer warriors that I've mentioned before. He said they didn't see the full manifestation of what they sowed in prayer. But the next generation grabbed on a little bit more, and it went on. But it went clear back. It went back even further decades, another generation, generations of people that have wept and wept and wept for the coming of the Lord, for the coming of the Messiah, waiting for the former rain and the latter rain, sowing seeds of tears of prayers for the foundation of the revival that's about to take place. They were sowing it in the ground, and I could see before the Father's throne these beautiful seeds that were planted, but you couldn't see them. They were in the dirt, and they were dormant, and the Lord said these dormant seeds have all been planted. And as I was watching in this church of Living Word in Minnesota, all of a sudden those seeds got water on them that was coming from the throne, and it started to saturate. You could hear me talking about it in the vision, and it was a thick water that was glorious. I saw glory like water coming, but it covered the seeds with this manure, right? And I saw the water come on top of it. So all of a sudden I saw corn stalks start coming up in the middle of the altars, of all the pews where the chairs were. They started springing forth, and it started springing forth corn plants all over the place. There were corn plants. But as those seeds were being watered—some plant, some water, and some bring forth the increase. The Lord said to me, He said, "You're about to see the generation that's about to bring in the increase, the harvest time." And I saw Living Word, I saw Lynne as, like I said, a young woman, and she kept praying. And then all of a sudden I saw a glory mist fill the congregation, and as it was coming onto the congregation members—this is what's about to happen. And the Lord showed me what's about to happen. I saw Holy Ghost mist. It looked like a fog. But as it went onto the people, as it lifted and went away, it left a residue of gold dust. It was like gold dust all over the people. As this mist lifted, it left gold dust and diamond-like particles of diamonds, but they shone like a sparkling on their clothes. Wow. And the Lord told me, He said, 'There have been times in the past in other church services, not with Living Word but with other churches, that people have tried to mimic and try to imitate what God has done and what has been pure in times past. But this will be a new movement of a fragrance, of a beautiful outpouring of the Spirit of God like we've never seen it before. As the mist comes in, as it lifts, it will leave gold dust on folks. I'll be excited just with the mist. I mean, I'm rolling around in that mist cloud. If I'm seeing the mist, I'm like, this is... But God's doing another little bit of something to this. Not only is it—it's not like when you get mist in real life and it leaves a residue of moisture on your skin, some humidity, or when you walk in fog you feel humidity like the dew. But the Lord said as this happens in services, it will leave a gold dust, almost like when you see dust on your furniture, a residue of the glory. Wow. And I could see—this is what I thought was interesting—I saw where they are right now. And this is me, I'm not picking at the church, I don't know these people, but I saw from COVID to where they are now that the numbers are down, that things aren't like they were in the past with people showing up for prayer. Now, I don't know if this is true or not, but this is just what I saw. Now, if you go there and you say, "Brandon, that's off." Well, then call me off, but whatever. This is what I saw, and I'm just telling you what I saw. I don't add anything to or take away from anything that I see. But I saw a wave that was back in the '80s and '90s, that was strong prayer that came in like a wave. And as the years have gone by, the wave has receded, and there's dryness in between. Where the beach is, there's dryness there. And as the water keeps pulling back, the drier it gets on the beach. But the Lord said to me, 'What seems dry right now is not dryness. It's getting ready for another major wave of My glory and prayer on that church and on these other churches around the nation.' And I saw a tsunami wave, because the further the water is being pulled back, just like it is in a tsunami—it's pulling it back, pulling it back—all of a sudden, you go, 'Where's the water?' and it's 500 feet way back that way. People go, 'What happened to the water? The water's receding. Man, this is really bad.' And then all of a sudden you go, 'No, you need to run because there's about to be a major tidal wave of God's presence and glory.' And that is what's happening right now. The Lord said, 'You may say it's dry right now in the natural in the body of Christ, and what you feel right now in the natural, and not just concerning Living Word.' But He said, 'What you're seeing in the body of Christ right now seems really dry, Brandon, but what's happening is that wave is being pulled back. Get ready, because a major tsunami of My glory and My presence is about to invade America, it's about to invade South America, and it's about to invade all around the world. All around this world is about to have a major tsunami wave of the glory of God.' Because where it is the driest, it's because the water's receding. Get ready, because the Lord told me, He said, 'A major wave of My presence is about to invade this earth one more time, one more time.' And that's what I saw, the glory pulling back, and it was beautiful. So she's going to cry again. I sure love you; your heart is so tender. So as I saw that happening, then I saw that coming, and then it was like this. I saw it was like a rock that is being thrown in the middle of a pond. It doesn't just ripple one way; it creates a tidal wave all around it. And as Lynn was praying, I saw what's about to take place with the new generation, where the elderly generation is tired and they've done their part. And I saw runners running, and they were running in a sprint, but they didn't stop in stride to turn back and look and grab. They were running in stride and they caught on to what the elders had, and they grabbed a hold of the baton of the glory and they ran with it even further because they had young legs. But as this happened, I saw a rock in the middle of a pool of water, and the wave of the glory didn't just hit one way. It exploded all the way around. It had ripples to the north, the south, the east, the west, the northwest—all the way around, it was a ripple all around. But then I saw this: I saw old buses that looked like school buses going out from Living Word, and they were packing these buses full of people and they were evangelizing. People were getting healed with creative miracles and things were happening. I don't know if they do this or not, but I'm telling you this is what I saw. I saw new, fresh faces, a new, fresh revival coming to this church. And the Lord was warning me, He said, 'Brandon, I'm not done.' You may think the water's coming back. They may think... I don't know, this church could be totally on fire. You might say, 'Brandon, this is totally off.' I don't know; all I know is this is what the Lord is showing me. Maybe there's still a little fire there, or from where it was, I don't know. I'm just telling you what I see. But then the Lord showed me, I saw Azusa Street in California. And He told me, 'This church, Living Word, will become a new Azusa Street revival.' And He said, 'Not only will Living Word become Azusa Street, but Collinsville, Branson, California again, all these other churches.' And He said to me, 'There will be multiple Azusa Street revival strong points in Fort Worth. I saw Eagle Mountain. I saw these places for strong points of revival that are about to hit the land, and it will be like pillars of fire in the spirit realm, like what they saw in Azusa Street, that people will be coming there.' Oh, and then He showed me Charis Bible College for Andrew Wommack. Andrew Wommack was another place of like an Azusa Street revival in Colorado Springs, Colorado. I saw a major revival about to take place at Charis Bible College. And the Lord said to me, He said, 'It's all hands on deck right now. I'm calling all the generals. I'm calling whoever will just say yes to Me. I will pour out My Spirit upon all flesh.' And that's why He told me, He said, 'Brandon, you've been criticized about the visions that I give you. And people say, "Well, he sees more visions and more things than even the prophets of old saw." But the Lord said, "Brandon, all you're doing is fulfilling Joel chapter 2. In the last days, I said, I'll pour out My Spirit upon all flesh, and my young men will see visions, and my old men will dream dreams."' And He said, 'Brandon, you're fulfilling that word. Don't worry about what they say. You're fulfilling that word.' He said it to me again and He keeps telling me. He said, 'Don't worry. Young men will see visions and old men will dream dreams.' The old men are going to start to dream lots of dreams. They're going to tell you about what they're seeing. People are going to have visitations about hell. The Lord said, 'I'm going to show them and give them warnings to come back and give them a place and a platform to tell what they saw in hell.' If you have people reach out about that, that's what He told me. He said they're going to reach out. People are going to start talking about hell, and we'll know the authentic from the fake. You're going to know what God is saying—this is from Me and who's not. And I'm telling you all by the Spirit of God, people are going to start having visitations and manifestations of the glory of angelic hosts like we've never seen before. It's time to believe. It's time to receive. It's time to expect everything God has for you in these last days. Sister Billye called right after I uploaded that video and she goes, "Okay, tell me the scoop. What did you see? I want to know." And I said, "I didn't send that video to you. Somebody else did. So, somebody watches my channel." So, I'm thankful for whoever's out there supporting me. I just want to let you all know Jesus is the reason for this. And I'm so excited to be a part, you know, as we see what he's about to do in Living Word, and the prayers of the saints that were buried in the sand that people thought had gone dormant and they never saw the full manifestation of what they're believing for there. Those seeds are about to spring forth fruit all around the world. And I saw the glorious gospel in a way that we've never seen before. And then I saw a major revival about to hit California, and I told you all that, and he even said, "Remember the Welsh revival where they had to train the donkeys to go on different commands other than by swear words?" Because there was so much revival that took place in Welsh that people were so foul and had bad language that the donkeys didn't know how to operate in the commands they were being told because they were just used to being sweared at all the time. And the miners all got born again, and it was like Sunday there all the time. There was a glorious outpouring that happened in the Welsh revival, and the Lord showed me, he said, "The porn industry will dry up for a season because of what's going to happen in Hollywood." He said, "Brandon, I'm going to visit Hollywood, for the deeper the blue, the greater the revival." And remember, "I'm going to show up in Hollywood." And I saw certain key celebrities, major A-list celebrities, giving their heart to Jesus Christ and having indoor meetings in mansions. But as this happens, there will be people so hungry in these glory domes. Instead of sports domes, there'll be glory events, and there will be so much of this going on that people won't be looking at bad stuff on the internet for a little bit. They'll be so tied up and so excited about repentance that they'll be like, "Man!" And it's going to affect the industries. And remember I told you about Mel Gibson? Mel Gibson will make a new movie. Back several months ago, the Lord said, "Believe for $50 million because the budget will be around $50 million, and people will come against him very strong concerning this $50 million." And when he releases this movie, it will be a shockwave throughout the movie theaters with the glorious outpouring even in the movie theaters. So pray for Mel Gibson. He's going to need it because I saw great spiritual, satanic warfare coming against him concerning this. It's a major film and it will be something that will shake the whole world. But as I was praying, the Lord said, "This isn't about just America. This is about the whole world." And as I was looking, he said, "South America, a major revival; Australia..." It just kept going. Holy Ghost fire will visit every corner of the earth, every nation all around the globe. You're going to see a major move of God's presence. So, I just want you to get excited when I call out these churches. You say, "Well, that's so far away from me." I'm not trying to tell you that to say, "Well, you know, Living Word's like almost 700 miles from me, I think. I don't remember how." Well, it's quite a ways from us, but we'll go and visit if that happens. I'm going to be for real with you. I'll be the first one there camped out with an RV saying, "Hey, we're not leaving." I just want you all to have anticipation. The same thing with Collinsville, same thing with Brandon. Those are just the ones that he showed you. There could be way more, way more. It's not like he goes, "Well, Brandon, these are the only places." Expect your church to have that, too. Expect your church to have it, too. Sister Billye was talking about Armenia and the revival that took place there during the outpouring of Azusa Street, and things that were type and shadow that happened over there. I didn't know it even happened. She said, "Yeah, I'll show you." She was going to send me a book. But I just want to get you all fired up and encouraged today to believe God for big where you are. Because when I was seeing all this, and all the glory dust and all the things the Lord was showing me, I could see the glory in the atmosphere. I could see the presence of the Lord changing the atmosphere even of these ministries in this church. And I'm telling you, Branson's going to have one. And she told me, she said, "Brandon," when she called us, she said, "Brandon, we're having a glorious outpouring even with our young people." And she was talking about her grandson getting the Holy Ghost and fire—and now get it, it was intercessory prayer, groanings coming from the kids. And she said there was a prophetic word that went forth about the kids in the last days, the last part of it. I believe it was somebody—I don't remember who she said—but she said that they got the word that right before the end of the end, the children would start to intercede and have intercessory prayer. And I got so excited about it because that's what we're seeing even with our little one. And we're going to see more and more and more for what the Lord has in store. And I believe, even going into 2026, 2025, finishing up this year, regardless of what some people say—"Well, we're not going to see financial outpouring, we're not going to see all this"—God forbid. We need supernatural things to take place in this season right now for this three-and-a-half-year window to believe God for a major harvest of souls, believing God for a supernatural increase in your household, that whatever you put your hands to, you will prosper. That's why I try to tell you all to believe God for big regardless. That's why I was believing God for certain cryptocurrencies, saying, "Lord, you're going to breathe on this." Now, not everybody wants to believe that, and that's fine, but I'm going to believe God for it. I'm standing on it because I know what I've seen and I know what I hear. And it may not be... He that has ears to hear, hear what the Spirit is saying. I don't look at mathematical charts to hear what God is trying to tell me. I don't have a PhD in hermeneutics or anything. I am just an old country boy that follows the voice of God like a pin drop. And I listen, and I listen again. And I do not line myself up with other people. I keep to myself and I listen to what the Lord has told me to do. And he said, "Line up with these elders and line up with this elder. Do exactly what I tell you to do and stay on track." And I just follow his voice. It may not be the most popular crowd, it may not be the most anointed crowd, it may not be the most whatever. I just follow what the voice of the Lord tells me to do. Do you understand? You have to follow the voice of God for your life. And what does the Lord tell you to do? That's why I say I'm not a financial adviser, I never am. But I'm going to tell you this: I know what the Lord has told me, and a major shaking is coming. A major shaking to awaken is coming. And most people say, "I don't want to hear that, Brandon. That scares me." I'm not here to scare you; I'm here to prepare you, to warn you of what the Holy Spirit is telling us. And he tells us, "Brandon, I'm coming." And that's the main thing I focus on—not about plagues, or viruses, or volcanoes, or earthquakes, or famine, or any of these things. I focus on the soon return of my Lord, and he's coming. But he's coming back for a glorious church, and we're about to see that glorious church. So, basically, that's what I had for y'all today. I just wanted to give you something just to stir you up a little bit, to come here and get refreshed, to come here and say, 'Man, I can go on again tomorrow,' and to say, 'Hey, you've got what it takes.' You know, whatever it takes to fan that flame. When I get these visions and we get this stuff, it comes out of hours of intercessory prayer. But we love you so much. We're so thankful that you would join us today and be a part of our YouTube broadcast. Let's pray for you real quick and believe God for your miracle. Whatever you have need of, Jesus has the answer for it. Nothing's too big, and nothing's too small. Jesus Christ paid the price for it all. Whether it's a financial breakthrough, if you're believing for finances, I believe that this is the time that you'll have more than enough. I will not participate in an economic downturn. I will not participate in economic struggle. I'm a tither. I'm a giver, and I have tither's rights. And Diana and I, we stand on that no matter where we are in our life. We believe we receive. Whatever the Bible says I can have, I have. And He said in His word that He would supply all my needs according to His riches in glory by Christ Jesus. So I want you today to believe for your financial breakthrough, whatever it may be. You can say, 'Brandon, I'm down to my last $5. We don't have enough money to even get to the first of the month because we don't even have enough to get to the first of the month. We have another week left until next Monday. I don't even know how, but my God shall supply.' And as a tither and a giver, you can put a demand on the seed you've sowed. 'Father, You are the one that provides. You bring forth the harvest over the seeds I have sowed in the past. I thank You, Lord, that it's not one-for-one, but You are the God of multiplication.' And whenever You're a God of multiplication, it's a 30, 60, and 100-fold return. And I believe that You're the God that gives the 100-fold return when I sow into good ground and good soil. And I call that forth in the name of Jesus. I thank You, angels of the Lord. Go and get my finances. Cause favor to come to me today, angels. Thank You, Lord, for bringing forth the harvest in the name of Jesus. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over will men give unto my bosom. And I believe that for you today. I believe, Father, that You're going to supply for them, that whatever they put their hands to will prosper today. I thank You, Father, that You're the God of more than enough. Now, Lord, over their marriage, I thank You, Lord, that their marriages are blessed. I pray over every single one of them, Father, that they get strife out of their home. For where there is strife, there's confusion and every evil work. We take authority over strife in the name of Jesus, and we'll not have strife in our households. We'll have peace that passes all understanding. Love is king in our homes. Father, I thank You, Lord, that love takes no account of a suffered wrong. No matter how much she may say or how much I may say, we say we are going to love. We're not going to have strife. We're going to have peace and joy in this house. And that's what you have to say over your house. 'You're going to have peace. We're going to have love. Love is king in our home.' Yes, you can't afford to have strife in your house. It destroys it; it is the thief of all your blessings. I will say, 'No, if she's having a bad day...' I say, 'Let's just agree to disagree on that, and we'll come back to it later, but let's just pray for each other.' You know what I'm saying? And it doesn't happen very often, but when it does, you just keep praying over it and you have peace. Keep peace a priority in your home. Everybody has stuff they go through. Nobody sits there and says, 'Well, we're perfect. Diana and I, we've never had any struggles.' That's horse manure. Seriously, we're all human. But when Megan was first diagnosed and all that, we didn't think we were going to make it. But it's the keep-on-keeping-on attitude, saying, 'Listen, we're going to work this out. We're going to choose to make our marriage work.' That's what you have to do. 'I choose to make my marriage work, even if it seems unfixable at the time.' You can fix anything, Holy Spirit, with love. But it's going to take a little grit, a little gusto, and saying, 'I'm just determined. We're going to pray this out. We're going to pray together, and we're going to work this out.' And there's no such thing... we even say there's no such thing as the D-word up in here. Divorce is not a part of your vocabulary. The D-word is a quitter's mentality. We're not quitters. And that's what you have to say over your marriage. 'We're not quitters. Divorce is not an option.' Yeah, divorce is not an option. Love is king. And where that is, we're going to walk this out in love. We're going to get through this. We're going to go through this valley together. We're going to come out smelling good, not like fire, right? No, it's a refining. Every marriage is going to have some tests. But that's what I'm trying to tell you all: keep on keeping on. The foundation is loving Jesus. If you build your house upon the rock of the word of Jesus, when the storms of life come, it will not blow your house down. But if your house is built upon lust, sex, and perversion, your house is not going to stand. Your house must have a foundation in marriage of the word of God. And if the word is priority and the foundation in your home, when the storms of life come, your house will not blow down. And there're so many people emailing us and saying, 'Will you pray for me? I'm living with my boyfriend. Is it okay to be in this relationship without being married if we promise to get married in the future, even if we live in sexual sin and do all this stuff?' You're already building on a foundation that has cankerworms all in it. You need to repent and get it right. Make it clean. God's not going to bless sin. Do you understand? You cannot ask God to bless sin. He's not going to bless it. It goes against Him. If it goes against the word, He's not going to bless what goes against the word. It just says, 'Don't be fornicating. Don't be doing these things.' You need to walk upright before Him and be holy and say, 'Lord, hey, if you love that girl enough, you'll put a ring on it.
